mapper.select: SELECT id, pcode, category_code, category_name, description, visible, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM fun_category WHERE `status` = 1 AND id IN ( #{item} ) AND create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND create_time <= #{timeTo} AND id = #{id} AND pcode = #{pcode} AND category_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryCode}, '%') AND category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryName}, '%') AND visible = #{visible} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT pcode, category_code, category_name, description FROM fun_category WHERE `status` = 1 AND pcode = #{pcode} AND visible = #{visible} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
